\tzpentry{ID3959}{Text Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3959 introduces Text Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[\n\\text{THZ} := \\lim_{t \\to \\infty} \\left( \\frac{dS_u}{dt} \\right), \\quad \\text{where } S_u \\text{ is the symbolic potential manifold}\n\\]
